PrimeClean — WebSiteI have completed PrimeClean, a web project built with React and TypeScript, and published it as an open-source project on GitHub.
The primary goal of this project is to provide a modern, maintainable, and clean codebase that follows current web development best practices.
Technical Highlights

• 🏗️ React & TypeScript: Modular component architecture with strong type safety.

• 📱 Responsive Design: Fully responsive interface built with the Bootstrap 5 grid system.

• 🔍 Semantic HTML: Structured markup designed with SEO and accessibility best practices in mind.
This project is now part of my GitHub portfolio. You can explore the source code and view the live demo using the links below.
